opportunities.title: Scottsdale Public Art — Temporary Mural Public Art
opportunities.description: Scottsdale Public Art seeks an artist or team to design and paint a temporary exterior mural on a City of Scottsdale water riser and concrete SRP well site (south side of Thomas Road, between N 81st Way and N 82nd Street). The artwork theme should relate to water or the SRP canal system, and will be on display for two years. Open only to artists working in the state of Arizona, USA. Total budget: $10,000 USD. Deadline: August 17, 2026 | scottsdalearts.org

opportunities.title: The Homiens Art Prize 2026
opportunities.description: Open to all artists, all media, no theme. Three winners and twelve finalists exhibit; $1,000 cash awards and international visibility. Entry fee: $35 (limited free submissions available per round). Deadline: July 29, 2026 | homiens.com

opportunities.title: The New Emergence Art Prize 2026
opportunities.description: For emerging artists worldwide, any medium, no theme. Prize fund of £5,000+: a £1,000 grand prize, a two-week residency in Provence, mentoring and materials. Entry fee: £15 / £25 / £30 (1–3 works). Deadline: August 3, 2026 | newemergenceart.com

opportunities.title: PhygitArt 2026
opportunities.description: For digital, video, animation and generative artists (ages 22–60), with works made for immersive projection; virtual participation possible. An immersive showcase at Villa Graziani (29–30 August 2026) with networking, representation and exhibition opportunities. Organised by Creativo Insoddisfatti. Deadline: August 17, 2026 | artrabbit.com

opportunities.title: Talents Contemporains: Earth
opportunities.description: Open to artists with an established visual arts practice (any nationality), submitting existing outdoor sculptures or installations on the theme of Earth. Up to €15,000 (prize plus acquisition of the work) and permanent installation at Pontigny Abbey. Organised by the François Schneider Foundation. Free to enter (verify). Deadline: August 23, 2026 | fondationfrancoisschneider.org

opportunities.title: Discerning Eye 2026
opportunities.description: For UK-based artists only, any visual medium: small-scale works available for sale. Exhibition at Mall Galleries and online, with prizes worth £9,000+ and exposure to collectors and curators. Organised by The Discerning Eye. Entry fee: £15. Deadline: August 27, 2026 | artopps.co.uk

opportunities.title: 2026 Liu Shiming Artist Grants
opportunities.description: For early-career artists (studio-art degree 2016–2024, or debut show 2016–2026); application in English. Project grants supporting new work, disbursed on completion of the proposed project. Organised by the Liu Shiming Art Foundation. Free to enter (verify). Deadline: August 31, 2026 | lsmartfund.org

opportunities.title: Hyundai Motor Group – The 7th VH Award
opportunities.description: A global award for emerging media artists engaging with the context of Asia, featuring grants, a residency with Ars Electronica, and global exhibitions. Read more on Hyperallergic . Deadline: July 21, 2026 | vhaward.com

opportunities.title: Peters Valley School of Craft Residency
opportunities.description: This program is open to artists working in blacksmithing, ceramics, fibers, jewelry and fine metals, wood, and printmaking. Residents receive a $600 or $900 stipend to work in fully equipped studios for two or three weeks. Housing is included. There is a $10 application fee. Deadline: July 31, 2026| petersvalley.org

opportunities.title: Paul & Daisy Soros — Fellowships for New Americans 2027
opportunities.description: Up to $90,000 for immigrant & New American visual artists, architects & designers pursuing MFA, MA, PhD & other graduate degrees in any field at any accredited US institution. Read more on Hyperallergic . Deadline: October 29, 2026 | pdsoros.org Ucross – Spring 2027 Artist Fellowships General Studio Fellows and Native American Fellowship recipients enjoy uninterrupted time and space, private studi

opportunities.title: Ucross – Spring 2027 Artist Fellowships
opportunities.description: Paul & Daisy Soros — Fellowships for New Americans 2027 Up to $90,000 for immigrant & New American visual artists, architects & designers pursuing MFA, MA, PhD & other graduate degrees in any field at any accredited US institution. Read more on Hyperallergic . Deadline: October 29, 2026 | pdsoros.org  General Studio Fellows and Native American Fellowship recipients enjoy uninterrupted time and spa

opportunities.title: Wave Hill — 9th Annual AnkhLave Garden Project Fellowship
opportunities.description: Now accepting applications from NYC-based, BIPOC artists. Applications are welcome from artists who work across media. Six artists will receive $1,800 stipends for the Winter Fellowship. Deadline: August 10, 2026 | wavehill.org

opportunities.title: Leeway Foundation – Art and Change Grant
opportunities.description: This grant provides up to $5,000 to fund art for social change projects by women, trans, and/or gender nonconforming artists and cultural producers living in Greater Philadelphia. Deadline: August 3, 2026 | leeway.org To feature an opportunity from your organization on Hyperallergic , get in touch at hyperallergic.com/advertise .

opportunities.title: 2026 AICA International Incentive Prize for Art Critics
opportunities.description: Critics are invited to submit a 2000–3000 essay on the theme "Art criticism and eco-socially engaged practices: new writing, new challenges?" First place will receive €2000, second place €1000, and third place €500. Deadline: August 6, 2026 | aica.org
